channel.title: Fujian on zhouyang — The 25th Frame
channel.description: Recent content in Fujian on zhouyang — The 25th Frame

item.title: Tieguanyin: The Iron Goddess in Your Cup
item.description: The first time I smelled real Tieguanyin, I wasn’t drinking it. I was sitting in a concrete farmhouse in Anxi County, Fujian, watching a tea maker named Mr. Lin sift through a bamboo tray of dark green pellets the size of peppercorns. The room was warm — early October, no air conditioning, windows open to the terraced hills outside — and the air was thick with something I couldn’t place. Not jasmine. Not osmanthus. Something cooler. Wilder. It got into my sinuses and stayed there.
